XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER

Contains information about a team member.

typedef struct _XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER{
    XUID xuidTeamMember;
    CHAR szGamertag[XONLINE_GAMERTAG_SIZE];
    XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES TeamMemberProperties;
    DWORD dwFlags;
    FILETIME JoinDate;
} XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER, *PXONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER;

Members

xuidTeamMember
XUID structure that uniquely identifies the team member.
szGamertag

Null-terminated string that contains the player's gamertag. The format of the gamertag must adhere to the following rules:
  • Minimum of 1 character in length.
  • Maximum of 15 characters in length.
  • Can include only the following characters: A–Z, a–z, 0–9, and [space].
  • Cannot begin with a [space] character.
  • Cannot have multiple contiguous [space] characters.
  • Must begin with an alphabetic character (A–Z, a–z).
  • Cannot end with a space.

The gamertag is case insensitive for comparisons, but case should be preserved when stored. For example, Ubba and UBBA are the same and, hence, cannot both exist as accounts in the system, but whichever one was entered into the system, the case is preserved.

TeamMemberProperties
XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES structure containing additional properties of the team member.
dwFlags

Flag values that can be the following:
Value Description
XONLINE_TEAM_MSG_RECRUIT Indicates the player who retrieved the team member details has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_TEAM_RECRUIT message sent by this team member.
XONLINE_TEAM_MSG_GAME_INVITE Indicates the player who retrieved the team member details has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_GAME_INVITE message sent by this team member.
XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_RECRUITED Indicates that the specified team member is a recruit, rather than an accepted, full member of the team.

JoinDate
FILETIME structure containing the date and time that the team member joined. This time value is reported in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also
